zh.lifeSummary: 當Odard Wigton de Norwoods於1304年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾費福斯頓時，他的父親Adam de Wigton30歲，母親Isabel de Ford25歲。他和Millicent Blakehill至少有2個女兒。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭享年26歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wigton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Glasgow): habitational name from Wigton (Cumberland), named with the Old English personal name Wicga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. It is unclear whether the Scottish name is of independent origin, but it does not seem to be associated with Wigtown (Wigtownshire).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Norwoods
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Northwood or Norwood, such as Northwood in Essex, Middlesex, Isle of Wight, Norwood in Middlesex and Surrey, or Northwood Farm in Okehampton and Northwood Farm in Morchard Bishop, both in Devon. The placenames mean ‘north or northern wood’, from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wudu ‘wood’ or Middle English north + wode. Compare Norrod .

variants.name: Nard
meanings: Altered form of English   Norwood  . Compare   Norrod  .
In some cases probably also French: from a short form of the personal name   Bernard  . Compare   Denard  .

variants.name: Norrod
meanings: Altered form of English   Norwood  . It was further respelled to   Nard  ,   Norred  ,   Norrid  , and   Nored  .
History: Benjamin Isaac Norrod (1735–1816) came from Buckinghamshire, England, to MD in 1735, and moved on to Stewart County, TN.

nameMeanings.name: Odard
meanings: Same as the Alemannic name Gothart; from cuat-hart, very good.

en.lifeSummary: When Odard Wigton de Norwoods was born in 1304, in Fewston, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Wigton, was 30 and his mother, Isabel de Ford, was 25. He had at least 2 daughters with Millicent Blakehill. He died in 1330, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.Norwoods, Yorkshire, England: Norwood in Fewston, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Odard Wigton de Norwoods est né en 1304, à Fewston, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Wigton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ford, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Millicent Blakehill. Il est décédé en 1330, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.Norwoods, Yorkshire, England: Norwood in Fewston, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom

Er hatte mit Millicent Blakehill mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 26 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

ko.Norwoods, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노우드 인 프w스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Odard Wigton de Norwoods(이)가 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 프w스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Wigton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Ford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Millicent Blakehill(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.
